caption: In the video, a person is demonstrating crafting supplies from the "Feels Like Frost Suite." They hold a bottle of Shimmery Crystal Effects in their left hand and a container of Ice Stampin' Glitter in their right hand. The background features an open catalog displaying various frost-themed cards and products, including the Frosted Folage Stamp Set, Frosted Frames Dies, and the Frosted Folage Bundle. The person appears to be explaining or showcasing how these products can be used together to create festive, wintery designs. The focus is on the glitter and crystal effects, likely highlighting their application in crafting projects.
